summary: Phase M backend testing completed with critical LLM budget limitation

parameter_validation.issue: skip_tts parameter appears to be accepted (no 422 validation error)

passed_tests: GET /api/v1/stylist/history - returns session_id and messages array
POST /api/v1/closet/analyze - processes image and returns garment analysis
PATCH /api/v1/users/me - language persistence works (Hebrew test passed)
POST /api/v1/stylist parameter validation - correctly rejects missing text/voice_audio with 400
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: EMERGENT_LLM_KEY budget has been exceeded. Need to either: 1) Increase budget limit, 2) Provide new API key, or 3) Reset current key budget. Cannot test Phase M skip_tts functionality without working LLM integration.

success_percentage.backend: 20% - Core endpoints work but stylist pipeline blocked by LLM budget
